word: G603 - ἀποκαραδοκία - apokaradokía - ap-ok-ar-ad-ok-ee'-ah - Earnest expectation

sections.paragraph:
ἀποκαραδοκία - apokaradokia - ap-ok-ar-ad-ok-ee'-ah

From a compound of G575 and a compound of κάρα kara (the head) and G1380 (in the sense of watching); intense anticipation: - earnest expectation.
